rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly analyzed the argument chain, identifying multiple inconsistencies and proposing detailed fixes.
rationale.RX.1: The agent effectively disclosed uncertainties, highlighting areas of doubt and missing evidence in the original work.
rationale.RX.3: The critique remained within the agreed scope, addressing relevant points without significant drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; instead, potential issues were identified and addressed.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change was annotated with sources and reasons, ensuring traceability.
